name: bandit.roof_fire_horde_staged_horde_audit_mcw
description: Setup-only audit for Roof-fire horde detection proof packet v0: install the named staged-horde fixture and require saved overmap horde_map metadata for one mon_zombie horde at player-relative offset [0,-240,0]. This is reproducible horde footing only, not roof/fire product proof.

steps.label: staged_horde_setup_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the transformed McWilliams staged-horde fixture loads to the normal live map before saved horde metadata is audited

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_before_roof_fire_product_path
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap horde_map metadata did not contain the staged mon_zombie horde at player-relative offset [0,-240,0]
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved overmap horde_map metadata contains the staged mon_zombie horde before any roof/fire product proof may use this footing
steps.failure_rule: missing or unreadable saved horde metadata keeps roof-fire horde proof blocked at setup
